name: World English Bible (WEB)
description: Public-domain English Bible translation based on the American Standard Version.

name: Easton's Bible Dictionary (1897)
description: Classic biblical encyclopedia in the public domain.

name: Westminster Shorter Catechism (1647)
description: Historic Reformed catechism summarizing Christian doctrine.

name: Apostles' Creed
description: Early Christian statement of core beliefs.

name: Nicene Creed (381 AD)
description: Ecumenical creed affirming the Trinity and the person of Christ.
